project.name: Agent Memory Skill
project.objective: Demonstrate topic interruption handling for an AI agent memory skill.

active.text: Design the model migration packet for an agent memory skill.

closed_recently.text: Explore how to capture and recall side ideas.
closed_recently.evidence: The side idea appeared while discussing model migration.

episodes.text: User raised a side idea: small interruptions should be remembered and recalled later when relevant.
episodes.evidence: The side idea appeared while discussing model migration.

migration.summary: The demo parks a main topic, captures a side idea as an episode, then resumes the main topic for handoff.
next_actions: Continue designing the model migration packet.
risks: Do not drop the side idea just because the main topic resumed.
handoff_notes: A future agent should read the episode before deciding whether the side idea matters again.
